name: BBO vs Deep Book Divergence with Trade Flow Confirmation
hypothesis: A large divergence between BBO imbalance (high obi_1) and deep book imbalance (low/negative obi_ex_bbo) signals an aggressive, short-term push. This is distinct from a consensus move. Requiring confirmation from positive signed trade flow ensures this is a real transaction-driven event, not just quoting activity, predicting a strong but brief momentum continuation.
mutation_note: Inspired by the success of 'obi_1 - obi_ex_bbo' at short horizons, this spec adds a trade flow confirmation filter to improve signal quality by removing instances of pure quote-stuffing.
